'''Pavik Tharen''' was the brother of [[Bria Tharen]] and son of [[Sera Tharen]] and [[Renn Tharen]]. When Bria returned to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] after escaping [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]], Pavik and Sera were disgusted by Bria's companion. With the arrival of the authorities investigating Solo—who had a [[Death mark/Legends|death mark]] on his head from [[Teroenza]]—Bria and her brother had a falling out and never met or spoke again.

It was Pavik who first suspected that Han was involved in illegal activity, especially after [[Dael Levare]] called Han by an alias upon first meeting the young man. Pavik then recognized Han from another scam of [[Garris Shrike]]'s, and contacted [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] against his father's, and Bria's, wishes.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1st}}
